validated_commands.test_core: cd python && uv run --python=3.12 pytest packages/core/tests/core/ -x -q
validated_commands.test_all: cd python && uv run poe test -P core -A
validated_commands.lint: cd python && uv run --python=3.12 ruff check packages/core/agent_framework/_compaction.py
validated_commands.note: uv binary: pip3 install uv, then $HOME/.local/bin/uv. Use --python=3.12 for CPython (not PyPy)

backlog.description: Redundant observable_kwargs dict copy in FunctionTool._invoke_with_invocation_context (hot path per tool call)
Two re.sub() calls in _sanitize_agent_name use uncompiled patterns (called per-agent setup)
_normalize_mcp_name in _mcp.py uses uncompiled pattern (called at tool-load time)
Full scan of dotnet/src not yet done

efficiency_notes: uv install: pip3 install uv (binary at $HOME/.local/bin/uv, not on default PATH in agent env)
PyPy is default Python - use --python=3.12 for CPython (avoids hyperlight wheel issues)
Pre-existing test failures: test_harness_agent.py (missing agent_framework_tools) and test_telemetry.py (mocked import). Both unrelated to efficiency changes.
ruff is available via uv run --python=3.12 ruff check
No existing benchmark suite found - performance verified with synthetic timeit scripts
PR CI: team_check and add_label failures are infrastructure-only, not caused by code changes
